payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Dark brown/black leather three-seat couch with glossy, padded segmented cushions and visible stitched seams forming rectangular panels; high tufted back with three vertical back sections, rounded armrests, and faint recliner/footrest outlines; left side slightly edge-cropped in the image; appears in good condition and photographed from about 2.0 meters away.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark brown leather three-seat couch","long_description":"Dark brown/black leather three-seat couch with glossy, padded segmented cushions and visible stitched seams forming rectangular panels; high tufted back with three vertical back sections, rounded armrests, and faint recliner/footrest outlines; left side slightly edge-cropped in the image; appears in good condition and photographed from about 2.0 meters away.","attributes":["dark brown/black leather","three-seat","padded segmented cushions","stitched seams/paneling","tufted high back","rounded armrests","glossy sheen","left edge slightly cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
